# Media219 Ltd

> Television graphics and title sequences studio with 30+ years experience creating quality content for broadcasters worldwide.

## Company

- **Name:** Media219 Ltd
- **Founded:** 1994
- **Expertise:** Television graphics, title sequences, 3D models, virtual sets
- **Contact:** tony@media219.com
- **Website:** https://media219.com

## Services

### Television Graphics
Broadcast-quality graphics packages for live television. Real-time data integration, clean visual language, instant viewer comprehension.

### Title Sequences
Opening titles and programme branding. From the first frame, audiences know what they're watching.

### 3D Models
Stadium fly-throughs, virtual environments, animated elements. If it needs depth, we build it.

### Virtual Sets
Complete virtual studio environments for broadcast. Flexible, scalable, broadcast-ready.

### Player Profiles
Animated player statistics and profile graphics. Data visualisation for live broadcast.

### Match Graphics
Score bugs, team lineups, substitution graphics, VAR explanations. Everything a live match needs.

## Portfolio Highlights

### Football / Soccer
- **Premier League** — Title sequences, match graphics, 3D stadiums, player profiles, fantasy graphics, legends series (long-term partnership)
- **FIFA World Cup** — 2014 Brazil, 2018 Russia, 2022 Qatar player profiles
- **MLS** — Worldwide graphics package, MLS Next Pro
- **Serie A** — International graphics package
- **EFL/ITV** — Highlights and title sequences
- **FA Cup** — Final graphics
- **UEFA Euro** — 2008 tournament coverage

### Other Sports
- **BBC Snooker** — Championship coverage
- **Super League Triathlon** — Arena Games graphics
- **Silverstone Classic** — Title sequence
- **E1 Boat Race** — Title sequence
- **Trans World Sport** — Programme graphics

### Entertainment & Networks
- **Telemundo** — Paris 2024 virtual set
- **NBCSN** — Great Houses promo

## Why Choose Media219

- **30+ years experience** in television graphics
- **Premier League partnership** — trusted for top-tier football coverage
- **FIFA World Cup credentials** — multiple tournaments
- **Global network relationships** — BBC, ITV, NBC, Telemundo
- **Full-service studio** — from concept to broadcast-ready delivery

## Contact

For broadcast graphics projects, title sequences, or virtual set requirements:

- **Email:** tony@media219.com
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/company/media219
- **Vimeo:** https://vimeo.com/media219
